parameters.content:
### New Lead Form Submission

Serves an n8n-hosted form (Email, Company, Score). Each submission becomes one execution.

Next: Route by Work Type

### Route by Work Type

Routes each item to one of 3 lanes: inbound, outbound + fallback.

Ports: ①→ Process 'inbound' → HubSpot · ②→ Fast-Track 'outbound' + Alert · ③→ Hold Unknown Types (DLQ)

### Process 'inbound' → HubSpot

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Fast-Track 'outbound' + Alert

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Hold Unknown Types (DLQ)

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Merge Routed Work

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Align Field Names

### Align Field Names

Normalizes field names so every source feeds the same downstream schema.

Next: Sort Leads Newest First

### Sort Leads Newest First

Orders items (newest first) so limits and digests pick the most relevant records.

Next: Guard Non-Empty email

### Guard Non-Empty email

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

Next: Send Summary to Gmail

### Send Summary to Gmail

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

# Qualify demo requests with HubSpot and Gmail on autopilot

**Pattern:** Lead Capture & Routing · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Form

## What it does
Qualify demo requests with HubSpot and Gmail on autopilot. It starts from a hosted form submission.

## Why it exists
Manual enrichment is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
New Lead Form Submission → Route by Work Type → Process 'inbound' → HubSpot → Merge Routed Work → Align Field Names → Sort Leads Newest First → Guard Non-Empty email → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to lead capture & routing without manual effort
- Anyone automating enrichment in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Improves response time
- Standardizes the process every time
- Removes copy-paste errors

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; HubSpot private-app token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your enrichment process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
